title: Food partnership, life sciences speaker series unveiled at Lilly’s 150th anniversary event
description:

description:
Gary Lemon has been part of the Greencastle campus since 1976 and serves as the Q. C. Noblitt professor in economics and management.

title: Comcast completes high-speed internet build in 4 Indiana counties
description: The buildout in parts of Hendricks, Wayne, Allen and Delaware counties is part of Comcast’s $634 million investment in Indiana over the past three years to close the digital divide in rural communities, the company said.

title: Trump’s proposed ‘Golden Dome’ estimated to cost $1.2 trillion
description:

title: Corteva to keep its headquarters in Indianapolis post-split
description:
Agricultural giant Corteva Inc. plans to keep its headquarters in Indianapolis following the upcoming separation of the seed and crop protection parts of its business, the company announced Monday afternoon.

description:

description:
